title: Asking for Directions
description: Find your way around a German city: ask where things are and understand the answer.
situation: Getting around: asking for places, understanding left and right, and using public transport.

phrases.english: How do I get to the train station?
phrases.tip: Use 'zum' for masculine/neuter places, 'zur' for feminine: zur Post.

phrases.english: Which line goes to the centre?
phrases.tip: Useful for the U-Bahn (metro) and S-Bahn (suburban train).

phrases.german: Können Sie es mir auf der Karte zeigen?
phrases.english: Can you show me on the map?
phrases.pronunciation: KUR-nen zee es meer owf dair KAR-tuh TSY-gen

phrases.english: Thank you very much for your help
